title: Legal Terms
prevails: Note: These Terms are governed by Spanish law. In case of any discrepancy between language versions, the Spanish version prevails.

s1.title: 1. Service Description
s1.p1: Rosa XOXO is an exclusive adult digital content subscription service. It includes access to a private Telegram channel with photos, videos and intimate content, and, in the annual plan, personalised written explicit chats by appointment (max. 2 per month).
s1.p2: The service is entirely digital and text-based. It does not include voice calls, video calls, audio messages, in-person meetings or any physical contact.
s1.p3: The user acknowledges that both the visual content and the conversations described herein are of a synthetic and automated nature, as detailed in clauses 3 and 4.

s2.title: 2. Age Verification and Adult Content
s2.p1: This site contains sexually explicit material intended exclusively for people over 18 years of age. By subscribing you declare under your own responsibility that you are of legal age in your country of residence. The service provider reserves the right to suspend any subscription upon evidence of use by a minor.

s3.title: 3. Synthetic Nature of Content and Artificial Intelligence
s3.p1: The user expressly acknowledges and accepts that «Rosa XOXO» is a fictional digital identity and that all visual content of the service—photographs, videos, images and any other graphic material—is synthetic content generated, recreated or modified, in whole or in part, using artificial intelligence systems and other digital content generation tools.
s3.p2: Accordingly, such content does not necessarily correspond to a real physical person or to real events, places or situations. Any resemblance to real persons is mere coincidence or a result of the generation process itself.
s3.p3: This synthetic nature is an essential part of the service's value proposition. The user declares that they are aware of and accept this before completing their subscription, and cannot claim error, ignorance or lack of information in this regard, nor make claims on the grounds that the content was generated by artificial intelligence.

s4.title: 4. Artificial Intelligence Agent in Conversations
s4.p1: The user acknowledges and accepts that conversations, messages and chats conducted via Telegram—including personalised chats in the Annual Plan—may be managed, assisted or responded to, in whole or in part, by a conversational artificial intelligence agent, and not necessarily by a real person in real time.
s4.p2: This AI agent is designed to maintain the consistency of the «Rosa XOXO» character and generate adult conversational content in written text, for exclusively recreational and adult entertainment purposes. Responses are generated automatically, may not be accurate or consistent and do not constitute professional, psychological, medical or any other type of advice.
s4.p3: In compliance with the transparency principle set out in Article 50 of Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 (Artificial Intelligence Act), the service provider clearly and in advance informs the user that they are interacting with an artificial intelligence system. By subscribing, you expressly accept interacting with said system.

s5.title: 5. Plans, Prices and Renewal
s5.i1: Monthly Plan (€3.50/month): access to the private channel. Automatic renewal every 30 days.
s5.i2: Annual Plan (€30/year): includes the above plus personalised written chats by appointment (max. 2/month). Automatic renewal every 365 days.
s5.i3: Payment is charged at the time of subscription.
s5.i4: Access is conditional on maintaining an active subscription.

s6.title: 6. Personalised Chats (Annual Plan)
s6.i1: Exclusively via written chat on Telegram.
s6.i2: May be generated or assisted by the artificial intelligence agent described in clause 4.
s6.i3: Require prior request with at least 24 hours' notice.
s6.i4: Maximum 2 sessions per month. Non-cumulative and non-transferable.
s6.i5: The service provider may end the session in the event of disrespectful conduct.
s6.i6: Do not include calls, video calls, audio messages or illegal content.

s7.title: 7. Service Limitations
s7.p1: The Rosa XOXO service does not include:
s7.i5: Physical contact or activities outside the digital sphere.
s7.i6: Illegal content or content involving minors.
s7.p2: Any request outside these limits will be rejected and may result in immediate cancellation without refund.

s8.title: 8. Cancellation and No-Refund Policy
s8.i1: You can cancel at any time via the Stripe portal.
s8.i2: The subscription remains active until the end of the already-paid period.
s8.i3: No refunds are made once access to the service has begun, in accordance with Spanish consumer law (art. 103.m LGDCU).
s8.i4: Exceptions will be considered when the service could not be provided due to reasons attributable to the service provider.

s9.title: 9. User Prohibitions
s9.i1: Reproducing, distributing or sharing any service content without the service provider's written consent.
s9.i2: Capturing or recording private conversations for distribution.
s9.i3: Harassing, threatening or blackmailing the service provider.
s9.i5: Using the service with or in the presence of minors.
s9.p1: Violation may result in civil and criminal liability, as well as immediate suspension.

s10.title: 10. Intellectual Property
s10.p1: All Rosa XOXO content—including synthetic content generated by artificial intelligence—is the exclusive property of the service provider or is duly licensed. The user does not acquire any intellectual property rights to the content, and its use is limited to personal, private and non-transferable enjoyment for the duration of the subscription.
s10.p2: Personalised chats and conversations with the AI agent are strictly private and confidential for both parties.

s11.title: 11. Data Protection (GDPR)
s11.p1: All data collected through the service is considered personal data and is processed in full compliance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR) and applicable Spanish data protection law (LOPDGDD).
s11.i2: Data processed: email, billing data provided to Stripe and the content of Telegram conversations.
s11.i3: Purpose: subscription management, service provision and improvement, and related communications.
s11.i4: Legal basis: performance of the subscription contract (Art. 6.1.b GDPR) and your explicit consent (Arts. 6.1.a and 9.2.a GDPR) for the processing of data relating to sexual life, considered a special category.
s11.i5: AI Conversations: messages exchanged with the artificial intelligence agent constitute personal data and may be processed and retained confidentially to provide and improve the service.
s11.i6: Processors: Stripe, Inc. (PCI-DSS) and Telegram Messenger. No card data is stored by Rosa XOXO.
s11.i7: Retention: for the duration of the subscription and applicable legal periods; subsequently erased or blocked.
s11.i8: Security measures: appropriate technical and organisational measures are applied to the risk of the processing.
s11.i9: International transfers: those carried out by Stripe and Telegram are provided with adequate safeguards under the GDPR.
s11.i10: Disclosure: data is not shared with third parties except as required by law.
s11.i11: Rights: access, rectification, erasure, objection, restriction and portability — write to rosa.only.1989@gmail.com.

s12.title: 12. Jurisdiction
s12.p1: These terms are governed by Spanish law. For any dispute, the parties submit to the competent courts of the consumer's place of domicile.
